combatlog.command_blocked: &cYou cannot use this command while in combat!
combatlog.enter: &cYou have entered combat! &7Do not log out!
rankup.confirm: &eType &f/rankup confirm&e to rank up to &f{rank}&e for &f{cost}&e.
rankup.maxed: &aYou are already at the highest rank.
rankup.not_ready: &cYou don't meet the requirements to rank up.
shop.player.claim_blocked: &cYou cannot create a shop here. You don't have permission to build in this claim.
time.not_supported: Time change is not supported on this server build.
time.player_only: This command can only be used by players.
mail.unread_join: &eYou have {count} unread mail(s). Use /mail to view.
more.already_max: &eThat stack is already at max size.
hologram.help.tip: &eTip: &7Use /holo edit <name> to set image facing direction via GUI!
